reason.en: Easy clear with any strong DPS. {S/SPD} tuning helps.
reason.jp: 強力なDPSで簡単クリア。{S/SPD}調整が有効。
reason.kr: 강력한 DPS로 쉬운 클리어. {S/SPD} 조정이 도움됨.
reason.zh: 用任何强力DPS轻松通关。{S/SPD}调整有帮助。

reason.en: Self-sustain {C/Striker} — no healer needed thanks to lifesteal.
reason.jp: 自己回復{C/Striker} — ライフスティールでヒーラー不要。
reason.zh: 自回复{C/Striker}——凭借吸血不需要治疗师。

reason.en: Strong {C/Defender} with {B/BT_SHIELD} to compensate no healer.
reason.jp: ヒーラーなしを{B/BT_SHIELD}で補う強力な{C/Defender}。
